description_long: This object is a pair of wireless earbuds housed in a compact, rounded rectangular charging case. The case is smooth and features a flip-top lid, which is open to reveal the earbuds inside. Each earbud is sleek, with a short stem and small black accent details that likely indicate sensors or microphones. The case and earbuds are predominantly white, with a subtle dark band visible on the back of the case, possibly representing a hinge or a design accent. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with no visible branding or buttons on the exterior. The object is small enough to be easily carried in a pocket or bag, making it suitable for portable, everyday use in urban environments.
description: A pair of white wireless earbuds in a smooth, compact charging case with a flip-top lid and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earbuds seated in the open charging case, with black accent details visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open lid and the profile of one earbud, revealing the case's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed hinge area and a dark band across the back of the case.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open lid and the other earbud, emphasizing the case's rounded shape.
